channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Canberra sees a decline in senior public service staff as workforce shifts to state capitals
item.description: Recent data from the Australian Public Service Commission shows a significant shift in workforce distribution, with Canberra losing more public service employees than it gains. In 2025, the national c...

item.title: Blood Test Shows Potential to Detect Depression Through Immune Cell Aging
item.description: A recent study from New York University suggests that depression could one day be detected with a simple blood test measuring the aging of certain immune cells, particularly monocytes. Researchers stu...

item.title: Tanzania mobilises society and government to fight malaria
item.description: Malaria still dey affect life for many Tanzanians, from children missing school to tragic deaths. Tanzania dey fight this disease using a combined approach wey go beyond government budget. The End Mal...

item.title: Kenya to Host Global Summit on Migratory Birds Amid Decline in Species
item.description: Kenya is gearing up to host the Global Flyways Summit in Nairobi this September, co-organised with Nature Kenya, as concerns rise over the decline of migratory birds worldwide. According to BirdLife I...

item.title: Philippines Implements Broad Measures to Address Global Economic Impact of Middle East Crisis
item.description: The Asian Development Bank (ADB) has recognized the Philippines as one of the countries with the most extensive and coordinated responses to the global economic disruptions caused by the Middle East c...

item.title: Nicole Kidman and Sunday Rose attend Met Gala together amid family changes
item.description: Nicole Kidman, the 58-year-old Oscar-winning actress, attended the 2026 Met Gala alongside her 17-year-old daughter, Sunday Rose, marking a notable joint appearance amid family developments following ...

item.title: Modern slavery in the UK rises amid economic pressures and technological exploitation
item.description: The independent anti-slavery commissioner (IASC) has reported a troubling surge in modern slavery within the United Kingdom. In 2025, over 23,000 potential victims were referred to the monitoring grou...

item.title: Celebrities Showcase Creative Outfits at the 2026 Met Gala
item.description: The 2026 Met Gala in New York drew a star-studded crowd, showcasing the annual celebration of fashion and art. This year’s theme, 'Costume Art', inspired guests to embrace bold and imaginative looks. ...

item.title: BJP Secures Major Gains in West Bengal Assembly Elections 2026
item.description: The Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) has achieved a significant electoral victory across eight districts in West Bengal, dealing a major blow to the ruling Trinamool Congress (TMC). This development in th...

item.title: Kenya President Ruto Visits Tanzania to Boost Bilateral Cooperation
item.description: President William Ruto of Kenya has touched down in Tanzania for a two-day State visit designed to reinforce the strong ties between the two East African neighbours. According to Tanzania’s Ministry f...

item.title: Ebonyi State lifts curfew after community clashes, restores schools and hospitals
item.description: The Ebonyi State Government don officially lift di curfew wey don dey for Amasiri community since February 2026. Dis curfew bin dey imposed after serious boundary wahala between Amasiri in Afikpo Loca...

item.title: Buba Galadima Alleges APC Trying To Stifle Opposition Ahead Of 2027 Elections
item.description: Nigerian Democratic Congress (NDC) big man, Buba Galadima, don accuse the ruling All Progressives Congress (APC) say dem dey allergic to proper democratic competition. Galadima yarn this one during in...

item.title: State Election Outcomes Set to Reshape Rajya Sabha Seat Distribution Over Next Two Years
item.description: The recent round of Assembly elections across key states is expected to gradually reshape the composition of the Rajya Sabha over the next two years, mainly through biennial elections in Kerala, Assam...

item.title: Key Factors Behind BJP’s First Ever Victory in West Bengal
item.description: In a historic shift, the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) secured a two-thirds majority in West Bengal, a state it had never won before. Analysts attribute this victory to five main factors. First, the Sp...

item.title: Cissé Nonuplets Celebrate Their 5th Birthday in Mali
item.description: Di Cissé nonuplets, better known as di 'Mali Nine,' don turn five years old today. Five years ago, Halima Cissé shock di world wen she give birth to nine healthy babies, something wey nobody really ex...

item.title: Researchers use timed magnetic fields to engineer exotic quantum phases with no static counterpart
item.description: Physicists from California Polytechnic State University have demonstrated that periodically switching a magnetic field over time can create exotic quantum states of matter that do not exist in static,...

item.title: KBRA Issues Preliminary Ratings for $490 Million Non-Prime RMBS Transaction Sponsored by Rithm Capital
item.description: Kroll Bond Rating Agency (KBRA) has assigned preliminary ratings to ten classes of mortgage-backed notes from the New Residential Mortgage Loan Trust 2026-NQM6 (NRMLT 2026-NQM6), a $490.1 million non-...

item.title: B.C. Premier Criticizes Federal Tariff Relief Exclusion for Softwood Lumber
item.description: B.C. Premier David Eby expressed strong frustration over the federal government's decision to exclude the softwood lumber industry from $1 billion in tariff relief funding. Eby highlighted that softwo...

item.title: Fireworks Factory Explosion in Hunan, China Claims 21 Lives
item.description: A tragic explosion occurred at Huasheng Fireworks Manufacturing and Display Company in Liuyang, Hunan province, China on Monday evening, leading to 21 deaths and 61 injuries. Liuyang, a key hub for fi...

item.title: Ashley Graham showcases silver-dipped manicure at Met Gala 2026
item.description: Ashley Graham made a striking appearance at the 2026 Met Gala, wearing a custom nude-toned Di Petsa dress and an unconventional silver-dipped manicure by Dawn Sterling. Her almond-shaped nails were en...
